stereotype: «Utility» — stable, infrastructure-opaque, in-process cross-cutting AuthN/AuthZ + customer identity + webhook signature verification
volatility: None — Utility design driver is stability + infrastructure-opacity, not volatility-encapsulation. Authentication/authorization infrastructure (Keycloak/OIDC/JWT/Cedar/HMAC/secret-store) is below aiarch's architectural waterline.

ops.note: Translates edge-validated Envoy-forwarded claims into an aiarch Principal; trusts the edge, never re-validates a JWT signature.

fields.name: VerifiedClaims
fields.note: Edge-validated Envoy-forwarded claims (map[string]string); not a raw JWT

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: ErrUnauthenticated (no/expired claims, Retryable=false) | ErrPrincipalUnknown (no provisioned principal, Retryable=false)

ops.signature: authorize(principal Principal, action Action, resource ResourceRef) → Decision
ops.note: Policy-decision point (PDP) returning Permit/Deny with a non-leaking reason code; Cedar PDP hidden; decision logged for audit ≤10ms; fail-closed on SecurityError.

fields.name: Action
fields.note: Struct with Verb string (e.g. 'drive-phase', 'approve-artifact'); not Cedar entities

fields.name: Resource
fields.note: Struct with Kind string, ID string, Tenant TenantScope

fields.name: Reason
fields.note: ReasonPermitted | ReasonNotPermitted — opaque, no policy detail leakage

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: ErrPolicyUnavailable (PDP unreachable, Retryable=true); FAIL-CLOSED — caller MUST treat SecurityError as deny

ops.signature: verifyWebhookSignature(channel WebhookChannel, rawBody []byte, presentedSignature SignatureMaterial) → void
ops.note: Verifies HMAC signature over raw body using channel-selected shared secret from vault; returns normally on success, errors on invalid/unavailable; fail-closed.

fields.name: Channel
fields.note: Logical channel id (e.g. 'merchant-gateway'); selects the shared secret internally

fields.name: RawBody
fields.note: Exact unparsed request body; must not have been re-serialised

fields.name: PresentedSignature
fields.note: Presented signature headers; scheme (HMAC) hidden inside

fields.name: (void)
fields.note: Returns normally iff signature is valid

fields.name: (error)
fields.note: ErrSignatureInvalid (terminal, reject webhook, Retryable=false) | ErrSigningKeyUnavailable (transient, Retryable=true); FAIL-CLOSED

ops.note: Returns a short-lived opaque credential + service Principal for outbound calls; identity infrastructure (Keycloak client-credentials/workload-identity) hidden; cached/refreshed internally.

fields.name: Audience
fields.note: String identifying the downstream the credential is for

fields.name: Opaque
fields.note: Attachable short-lived bearer credential; never parsed by callers

fields.name: Principal
fields.note: The service principal, usable in authorize()

fields.name: ExpiresAt
fields.note: Callers re-request near expiry; Utility caches/refreshes internally

dataContracts: VerifiedClaims = { values map[string]string } // edge-validated by Envoy; never a raw JWT
Principal = { Subject PrincipalID; Kind PrincipalKind; Tenant TenantScope; Roles []Role }
Action = { Verb string } // e.g. 'drive-phase', 'approve-artifact'; not Cedar entities
ResourceRef = { Kind string; ID string; Tenant TenantScope }
Decision = { Permit bool; Reason DecisionReason } // DecisionReason: ReasonPermitted | ReasonNotPermitted (opaque, no policy detail)
WebhookChannel = string // logical channel id, e.g. 'merchant-gateway'
SignatureMaterial = { values map[string]string } // presented signature headers; scheme hidden
ServiceCredential = { opaque string; Principal Principal; ExpiresAt time.Time }
SecurityError = { Kind ErrorKind; Retryable bool; Cause error }
ErrorKind = ErrUnauthenticated | ErrPrincipalUnknown | ErrPolicyUnavailable | ErrSignatureInvalid | ErrSigningKeyUnavailable | ErrIdentityUnavailable
errorModel: SecurityError with explicit Retryable flag. Fail-closed rule: for authorize and verifyWebhookSignature, a SecurityError MUST be treated by the caller as deny/reject. ErrUnauthenticated/ErrPrincipalUnknown/ErrSignatureInvalid: Retryable=false. ErrPolicyUnavailable/ErrSigningKeyUnavailable/ErrIdentityUnavailable: Retryable=true.
idempotency: All four ops are synchronous and idempotent by nature (no I/O side effects visible to callers). obtainServiceIdentity caches/refreshes the credential internally; callers hold it until near ExpiresAt and re-request on expiry.

revisions.summary: Initial contract — four ops covering the four declared Client edges (AuthN, AuthZ, webhook-signature, service-identity). Infrastructure-opaque; no JWT/Cedar/HMAC/Vault lexeme on surface. 9/9 App C §6 self-check PASS.

APPROVED — frozen. 9/9 PASS independently re-walked. OQ-1..OQ-5 confirmed. Two mayAmend amendments applied: A1 — status flipped to APPROVED/frozen + Rev 2; A2 — §2.2 authorize C-SE implementer note making ≤10ms audit emission explicit. No op/data-type/edge change.
